title: Add customer portal with Internet Identity login, product catalog, delivery tracking, and feedback system

requirements.text: Extend the backend actor to support customer-linked delivery records. Add a 'customerId' field (linked to Internet Identity principal) to existing delivery records so customers can query only their own deliveries.
acceptanceCriteria: A delivery record can store a customer principal ID
A query function returns only deliveries belonging to the calling customer principal
Existing admin delivery functions remain unchanged

requirements.text: Add a customer feedback system to the backend. Allow a customer to submit feedback on a delivery that is marked 'delivered' but was not received. Store feedback with fields: deliveryId, customerPrincipal, message, timestamp, and a 'flagged' boolean. Only customers can submit feedback; only admins can read all flagged feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: submitFeedback(deliveryId, message) callable by authenticated customer principal
Feedback is stored with flagged=true and timestamp
getFlaggedFeedback() returns all flagged feedback, accessible only to admin principal
Customers cannot update delivery status directly

requirements.text: Add an admin function to resolve flagged feedback by updating the delivery status and marking the feedback as resolved. Only the admin principal can call this function.
acceptanceCriteria: resolveFeedback(feedbackId, newDeliveryStatus) is callable only by admin
Delivery status is updated to the new value
Feedback record is marked resolved
Non-admin callers receive an error

requirements.text: Create a customer-facing portal as a separate route (/customer) in the React app. The portal must require Internet Identity login. Once logged in, customers see: (1) a full product catalog page, (2) their personal delivery history listing completed and missed deliveries, and (3) a feedback form on any delivery marked 'delivered'.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users are redirected to a login screen with Internet Identity button
Authenticated customers can view the full product catalog
Customers see a list of their own deliveries with status labels (Completed, Missed, Delivered)
A 'Report Issue' button appears on deliveries with status 'delivered'
Submitting the feedback form sends feedback to the backend and shows a success message

requirements.text: Add a 'Flagged Feedback' section to the existing admin panel (accessible only when logged in as admin). Display a list of all flagged customer feedback with delivery details, customer message, and a button to update the delivery status after investigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can see all flagged feedback in a dedicated dashboard section
Each feedback entry shows delivery ID, customer info, feedback message, and timestamp
Admin can select a new status and resolve the feedback via a form/dialog
Resolved feedback is removed from the flagged list or marked resolved visually

constraints: Only admins can update delivery statuses
Customers can submit feedback only — no direct status changes
Customer portal must use Internet Identity for authentication
All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Customers editing or deleting delivery records
Customer registration flow beyond Internet Identity
